## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Standardize async states across all pages/components
- Create reusable state components with consistent messaging
- Add retry actions for simulated failure states in mock services
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Error blocks include title, explanation, and action button
  - Skeletons mimic final layout dimensions
  - Empty states include illustration/icon + CTA

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Shared state components available
- [ ] Used in all major pages
- [ ] Retry logic wired where applicable
- [ ] PR includes screenshots (loading/empty/error for 3+ pages)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `ux`, `priority-high`
